title: pelargonium × cosmianum
intro: Pelargonium × cosmianum, also known as Rosy Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium triste. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Rosy Geranium include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its role in boosting the immune system and reducing stress. The plant's medicinal properties are often utilized in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its therapeutic benefits.
